name: loss-driven-development
description: LDD — loss-driven development for the AI-era coding loop. Twelve portable skills: ten reactive disciplines across three optimization loops (inner/code, refinement/deliverable, outer/method) + one opt-in architect-mode for greenfield design + the using-ldd entry-point. Measured Δloss_bundle = 0.561 (normalized mean across 11 skills; target ≥ 0.30).
